overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a player character walking through a futuristic corporate office interior. The environment features dark metallic walls with illuminated vertical strips, modern workstations with computers, and NPCs working at desks. The character moves steadily toward a metal exit door at the far end of the room.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the office space between rows of workstations

notable_agents.action: seated at desk working on computer terminal
seated at desk facing the workstation

entered.detail: modern desk with computer terminal and office chair
desk setup with monitor and red mug visible
large cylindrical structural column in the office floor
wall-mounted screen showing blue abstract graphics
illuminated vertical accent light on the dark wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic office interior with dark walls and illuminated accents. Workstations line both sides with NPCs seated at computers, while a large concrete pillar stands in the center of the room. The environment features modern corporate furnishings and soft artificial lighting from ceiling fixtures and wall strips.

scene_state.functional_zone: office exit corridor with waiting area

events.description: character approaches the metal exit door at the end of the office

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the exit door while passing a waiting area

notable_agents.action: seated on bench near the exit door looking toward the character

entered.detail: futuristic metal door with digital interface panel above it
black bench seating against the right wall
tall leafy plant in planter next to the bench
large wall screen displaying green and blue abstract aurora-like pattern

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the back of the office where a metal exit door is set into the wall beneath a digital display showing green abstract patterns. A waiting bench with a seated NPC and a large potted plant occupy the right side of the corridor. The concrete pillar now passes to the left as the character nears the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile corporate office that narrows into a focused path toward a secure exit. It begins by tracking the character through a wide interior defined by dark metallic walls and illuminated accents, passing rows of workstations where NPCs sit at computers. As the character moves forward, the perspective shifts past a large central concrete pillar, transitioning from the open office layout into a more confined corridor. The scene then opens up to reveal a metal exit door beneath a digital display of green abstract patterns, passing a waiting bench and a large potted plant on the right. Finally, the camera closes in on the doorway as the character reaches the end of the hall.
